failures.description: The agent invented/altered the answer by reporting 20 available options and a fabricated record ID despite the tool result showing 13 available items.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to count available Mechanical Keyboard options. The correct tool call was made and returned count = 13 at index 3. At index 4, the Executor produced an answer saying there are 20 options and cited record 0000000000, neither of which is grounded in the tool output or prior context. This false value was then approved rather than corrected, so the failure was not resolved.
